item.title: ✨ kiitos aalto fashion 2017-2025 ✨ v aware i might miss what often felt like an ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@elinaheilanen

✨ kiitos aalto fashion 2017-2025 ✨

v aware i might miss what often felt like an afternoon (or late night) small talk and a neverending arts and crafts session, but things end… and small talk? It felt big to me :-)

Se slideshow på Instagram

@elinaheilanen

✨ kiitos aalto fashion 2017-2025 ✨

v aware i might miss what often felt like an afternoon (or late night) small talk and a neverending arts and crafts session, but things end… and small talk? It felt big to me :-)

item.title: Thank you @alphafashionorg for the amazing event and for letting me be a part of...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@elinaheilanen

Thank you @alphafashionorg for the amazing event and for letting me be a part of it! 🌿

(What a welcome change it is to meet new people in person again and participate in a physical show :)! )
